name: Mato Seihei no Slave RPG (complete version)
description:
Today, I'm got message to make the low-key anime called Mato Seihei no Slave (Chained Soldier). Btw, do you know. This anime was first bot to collect all characters and it must better than i thought. So... Lemme tell you about first message.

1 be the man.

2 be the woman.

3 be the female soldier.

4 be the Humanoid Shuuki.

5 be the man with hidden potential.

Other first message like be monster and much more are add for later (I'm curious of season 2 that coming in new year btw.)
creator: Roland1234
